name: hono-compute-deno
description: Deno compute XRPC server with worker manifest and instance management

pds-url.description: PDS base URL for record creation

atproto-handle.description: AT Protocol handle for PDS authentication

atproto-password.description: AT Protocol app password for PDS authentication

attestation-key-path.description: Path to secp256k1 JWK key file for badge.blue attestation signing

permission-mode.description: Worker permission mode: deny-all (default), allow-all, or by-policy

policy-handler-loopback.description: Run built-in policy handler as ephemeral loopback HTTP service instead of Worker IPC

policy-handler-service.description: Remote policy handler AT Protocol service reference: did:web:<host>#<serviceId>
